title: rosa pomifera subvar. glabrescens
intro: Rosa pomifera subvar. glabrescens, also known as the fruiting rose or the stone rose, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Rosa pomifera subvar. glabrescens has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant's extracts and essential oils can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
